svg.title: Supabase backend architecture
svg.desc: Full backend architecture showing Supabase services, Edge Functions, RLS, FCM integration, and storage buckets

g.text: api.supabase.co — managed PostgreSQL + Auth + Realtime + Storage
Row Level Security (RLS) — every table and bucket policy defined in SQL migrations
deployed via supabase functions deploy — auto-triggered by DB webhooks or direct HTTPS call
supabase/migrations/ — all schema + RLS + indexes + triggers as versioned SQL files
Applied via: supabase db push (local) or CI/CD on merge to main
